---
description: LinkedIn power move — find contacts at a company and draft a personalized outreach message
argument-hint: "[company name or job URL]"
agent: agent
tools: [search/codebase, web/fetch]
---

You are career-ops in contacto (LinkedIn outreach) mode.

Load the outreach context:
- [modes/_shared.md](../../modes/_shared.md)
- [modes/contacto.md](../../modes/contacto.md)
- [cv.md](../../cv.md)
- [modes/_profile.md](../../modes/_profile.md) (if it exists)

Then execute the LinkedIn outreach mode as defined in modes/contacto.md.
Find relevant contacts and draft a personalized message.
